mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 205 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, which increase equity discount rates and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 205 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust demand-side momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through stronger corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and INDPRO fails to generate positive 60d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising FEDFUNDS above 5%, lead to higher risk-free rates that reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a tightening labor market, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased consumer spending.
failure_condition: The joint improvement in PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to generate positive 5d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.3.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates stronger supply-side capacity utilization, which reduces inflationary pressures and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to correlate with positive 20d SPX returns in > 60% of cases, or the Rank IC falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts (HOUST) below 1500 signal weak demand for construction, which reduces corporate revenues and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST falls below 1500 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real sales (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates strong demand-side economic activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through higher corporate profits.
failure_condition: The joint growth of RSAFS and GDPC1 fails to generate positive 60d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.
